# Source: CHIANTI v11.0.2 via ChiantiPy ion.boundBoundLoss
# Units: erg cm^3 / s, per ion per electron, low-density limit (n_e = 1 cm^-3)
# T grid: 121 log-spaced points, 10^3.00 K -> 10^9.00 K
# Generated by pyathena/photchem/data/build_cool_tables.py
#
